title: GörGöttGibb 2
description: A vanilla+, neoforge 1.21.1 modpack with vanilla worldgen & automation
body:
A 1.21.1 Neoforge vanilla+ modpack with its main focus on create and farmers delight.

This modpack focuses on a vanilla+ integration into minecrafts existing progression & world. With updated biomes and content mods that enhance the existing charm of minecraft without feeling excessive. With create to provide something to do.

the modpack also features optimisation mods and vanilla friendly tweaks to enhance the gameplay.

Main mods:
Create
Farmers delight
Critters and Companions
End remastered
Sophisticated Backpacks
Geophilic
Distant horizons


Some subbmods & addons:

Create: bells & whistles
Create: ore excavation
Create: copycats+
Create: interiors
Create: deco
Create: armor trims
Ocean's delight
Nethers delight
End's delight
